name: Annotation
description: Inline callout label anchored to content

name: Avatar
description: Circular user image or initials placeholder

name: Bubble
description: Compact numeric badge for notification counts

name: Button
description: Clickable control that triggers an action

name: Chip
description: Compact selectable or dismissible label tag

name: Code
description: Monospace inline or block code renderer

name: Form.Control.Feedback
description: Helper or error text below a Form.Control

name: Form.Label
description: Accessible label for a form control

name: Icon
description: SVG icon from the Paragon set

name: Truncate
description: Clamps text to N lines with ellipsis

name: ActionRow
description: Horizontal row organizing primary and secondary actions

name: AvatarButton
description: Clickable avatar opening a user menu

name: CheckBoxGroup
description: Group of checkboxes with shared label

name: Dropdown
description: Trigger button revealing a menu list

name: Form.Group
description: Wraps label + control + feedback as one field

name: IconButtonToggle
description: Mutually exclusive pair of icon-button toggles

name: Popover
description: Contextual overlay anchored to a trigger

name: RadioButtonGroup
description: Group of radios with shared label

name: SearchField
description: Text input combined with submit button

name: ValidationFormGroup
description: Form group with validation state — use Form.Group

name: Alert
description: Dismissible feedback banner with icon and actions

name: DataTable.Table
description: Core table element rendered within DataTable

name: Form
description: Wrapper providing context for form fields

name: Menu
description: Floating list of menu items with keyboard nav

name: PageBanner
description: Full-width informational banner pinned to top

name: StatusAlert
description: Prominent status with dismiss — use Alert

name: Stack
description: Flexbox utility stacking children with spacing

name: Stepper
description: Multi-step flow scaffold with step indicators

name: AccountSettingsPage
description: Top-level route rendering all account settings

name: JumpNav
description: Sticky in-page anchor nav for settings sections

name: CourseUnit
description: Unit editor with sidebar, breadcrumbs, xblock iframe

name: StudioHome
description: Studio landing listing courses and libraries

name: BulkEmailTool
description: Bulk email composer with recipient targeting

name: PostCommentsView
description: Threaded comments panel under a post

name: PostsList
description: Paginated filterable list of posts in a topic

name: PostsView
description: Layout shell pairing list + detail pane

name: CourseCard
description: Enrollment card with status, dates, actions

name: CourseFilterControls
description: Filter bar for narrowing course list

name: OutlineTab
description: Course home outline tab with progress

name: Sidebar
description: Contextual course sidebar with pluggable widgets

name: LibraryBlockCard
description: Card for a single reusable content block

name: CertificateCard
description: Single earned certificate with download link

name: Logo
description: Site/brand logo used in the header

name: PrimaryNavLinks
description: Horizontal list of primary navigation links for the desktop header

name: SecondaryNavLinks
description: Secondary nav link row in the desktop header

name: MobileNavLinks
description: Stacked nav link list rendered inside the mobile drawer

name: LegalNotices
description: Footer ToS, privacy, and accessibility link cluster

name: LabeledLinkColumn
description: Titled vertical list of footer links

name: Header
description: Top app chrome — logo, primary/secondary nav, auth menu; switches between desktop and mobile layouts

name: Footer
description: Site footer container that composes desktop/mobile footer layouts

name: MasqueradeBar
description: Staff banner above the header allowing role or user impersonation in a course

name: Shell
description: Root application shell that boots the runtime providers and renders the configured layout/router for an MFE

name: DefaultLayout
description: Default top-to-bottom page layout (header slot + main + footer slot) used when an app doesn't supply its own

name: DefaultMain
description: Default main-content region wrapper used inside DefaultLayout

name: Slot
description: Extension point that renders pluggable widgets into a named slot
